root.description: The waiting period, specified in number of days. After the waiting period ends, AWS KMS deletes the KMS key. If you specify a value, it must be between `7` and `30`, inclusive. If you do not specify a value, it defaults to `30`
root.name: deletion_window_in_days

root.description: Specifies whether key rotation is enabled. Defaults to `true`
root.name: enable_key_rotation

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [key asymmetric sign and verify users](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/key-policy-default.html#key-policy-users-crypto)
root.name: key_asymmetric_sign_verify_users

root.description: List of IAM policy documents that are merged together into the exported document. In merging, statements with non-blank `sid`s will override statements with the same `sid`
root.name: override_policy_documents

root.description: Determines whether an external CMK (externally provided material) will be created or a standard CMK (AWS provided material)
root.name: create_external

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for those who will have full key permissions (`kms:*`)
root.name: key_owners

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [key symmetric encryption users](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/key-policy-default.html#key-policy-users-crypto)
root.name: key_symmetric_encryption_users

root.description: Determines whether a replica standard CMK will be created (AWS provided material)
root.name: create_replica

root.description: A flag to indicate whether to bypass the key policy lockout safety check. Setting this value to true increases the risk that the KMS key becomes unmanageable
root.name: bypass_policy_lockout_safety_check

root.description: Base64 encoded 256-bit symmetric encryption key material to import. The CMK is permanently associated with this key material. External key only
root.name: key_material_base64

root.description: A valid policy JSON document. Although this is a key policy, not an IAM policy, an `aws_iam_policy_document`, in the form that designates a principal, can be used
root.name: policy

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [AWSServiceRoleForAutoScaling roles](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/autoscaling/ec2/userguide/key-policy-requirements-EBS-encryption.html#policy-example-cmk-access)
root.name: key_service_roles_for_autoscaling

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [key HMAC users](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/key-policy-default.html#key-policy-users-crypto)
root.name: key_hmac_users

root.description: Specifies whether the key contains a symmetric key or an asymmetric key pair and the encryption algorithms or signing algorithms that the key supports. Valid values: SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT, RSA_2048, RSA_3072, RSA_4096, HMAC_224, HMAC_256, HMAC_384, HMAC_512, ECC_NIST_P256, ECC_NIST_P384, ECC_NIST_P521, ECC_SECG_P256K1, ML_DSA_44, ML_DSA_65, ML_DSA_87, or SM2 (China Regions only). Defaults to SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT
root.name: key_spec

root.description: The primary external key arn of a multi-region replica external key
root.name: primary_external_key_arn

root.description: ID of the KMS Custom Key Store where the key will be stored instead of KMS (eg CloudHSM).
root.name: custom_key_store_id

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [key asymmetric public encryption users](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/key-policy-default.html#key-policy-users-crypto)
root.name: key_asymmetric_public_encryption_users

root.description: A map of IAM policy [statements](https://registry.terraform.io/providers/hashicorp/aws/latest/docs/data-sources/iam_policy_document#statement) for custom permission usage
root.name: key_statements

root.description: Determines whether the KMS policy used for Route53 DNSSEC signing is enabled
root.name: enable_route53_dnssec

root.description: Custom period of time between each rotation date. Must be a number between 90 and 2560 (inclusive)
root.name: rotation_period_in_days

root.description: Determines whether resources will be created (affects all resources)
root.name: create

root.description: Region where the resource(s) will be managed. Defaults to the Region set in the provider configuration
root.name: region

root.description: A map of tags to add to all resources
root.name: tags

root.description: Specifies whether to enable the default key policy. Defaults to `true`
root.name: enable_default_policy

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [key administrators](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/key-policy-default.html#key-policy-default-allow-administrators)
root.name: key_administrators

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [key users](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/key-policy-default.html#key-policy-default-allow-users)
root.name: key_users

root.description: Determines whether a replica external CMK will be created (externally provided material)
root.name: create_replica_external

root.description: A map of aliases to create. Values provided via the `name` key of the map can be computed from upstream resources
root.name: computed_aliases

root.description: The description of the key as viewed in AWS console
root.name: description

root.description: Specifies whether the key is enabled. Defaults to `true`
root.name: is_enabled

root.description: Indicates whether the KMS key is a multi-Region (`true`) or regional (`false`) key. Defaults to `false`
root.name: multi_region

root.description: List of IAM policy documents that are merged together into the exported document. Statements must have unique `sid`s
root.name: source_policy_documents

root.description: The primary key arn of a multi-region replica key
root.name: primary_key_arn

root.description: A list of aliases to create. Note - due to the use of `toset()`, values must be static strings and not computed values
root.name: aliases

root.description: A map of grant definitions to create
root.name: grants

root.description: Specifies the intended use of the key. Valid values: `ENCRYPT_DECRYPT` or `SIGN_VERIFY`. Defaults to `ENCRYPT_DECRYPT`
root.name: key_usage

root.description: Time at which the imported key material expires. When the key material expires, AWS KMS deletes the key material and the CMK becomes unusable. If not specified, key material does not expire
root.name: valid_to

root.description: A list of IAM ARNs for [key service users](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/kms/latest/developerguide/key-policy-default.html#key-policy-service-integration)
root.name: key_service_users

root.description: Determines whether the alias name is used as a prefix
root.name: aliases_use_name_prefix

root.description: Specifies whether the key contains a symmetric key or an asymmetric key pair and the encryption algorithms or signing algorithms that the key supports. Valid values: `SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT`, `RSA_2048`, `RSA_3072`, `RSA_4096`, `HMAC_256`, `ECC_NIST_P256`, `ECC_NIST_P384`, `ECC_NIST_P521`, or `ECC_SECG_P256K1`. Defaults to `SYMMETRIC_DEFAULT`
root.name: customer_master_key_spec

root.description: A list of maps containing `account_ids` and Route53 `hosted_zone_arn` that will be allowed to sign DNSSEC records
root.name: route53_dnssec_sources

root.description: The IAM resource policy set on the key
root.name: key_policy

root.description: Whether the key material expires. Empty when pending key material import, otherwise `KEY_MATERIAL_EXPIRES` or `KEY_MATERIAL_DOES_NOT_EXPIRE`
root.name: external_key_expiration_model

root.description: The state of the CMK
root.name: external_key_state

root.description: The cryptographic operations for which you can use the CMK
root.name: external_key_usage

root.description: A map of grants created and their attributes
root.name: grants

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the key
root.name: key_arn

root.description: The globally unique identifier for the key
root.name: key_id

root.description: The region for the key
root.name: key_region

root.description: A map of aliases created and their attributes
root.name: aliases
